relations.note: Both apply to structural definitions of the same campaign-style callout section.

quotes: Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

Background → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.
If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"`

rules.intent: Maintain visual consistency for the promotional callout banner across diverse email clients.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA Section features a full-width background image (or a solid fallback background of Sunshine #faa31b if skipped) and a centered, vertically stacked single headline and single CTA button layout.

    background-size="cover"
    background-repeat="no-repeat"
    background-position="center center"
    background-color="#faa31b"
    padding="48px 25px 56px 25px">

Headline → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
Headline → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

rules.intent: Maintain branding and typographic hierarchy on promotional callout banners.
rules.rule_text: The headline in the Gradient Callout CTA Section must be Brand Blue (#00529b), centered, styled in Nunito Sans weight 800 at 28px, and constrained to one line.
rules.snippets:
<mj-text
        align="center"
        color="#00529b"
        font-family="Nunito Sans, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif"
        font-size="28px"
        font-weight="800"
        line-height="34px"
        padding="0 0 32px 0">
      Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help
    </mj-text>

quotes:
<mj-text
        align="center"
        color="#00529b"
        font-family="Nunito Sans, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif"
        font-size="28px"
        font-weight="800"
        line-height="34px"
        padding="0 0 32px 0">
      Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help
    </mj-text>
Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.
Button radius (mandatory, never change): `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**

Button → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

Button radius (mandatory, never change): `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.
button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Maintain the unique brand signature layout and style of the Lisraya CTA button.
rules.rule_text: The centered callout CTA button must be Deep Blue (#003D74) with a white label in Nunito Sans 800 at 18px. It must measure 248 x 64px and end with a Gold (#FFC20E) '›' arrow (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. It must enforce the signature asymmetric border-radius (49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px); this radius cannot be simplified, rounded, or modified.
